tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List ng-blatui's 157 Angular components, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the ng-blatui registry (components, blocks, charts, templates) by keyword.

tools.name: get_docs
tools.description: Get a component/block/chart/template's docs by slug: install, import and the full structured API (inputs, two-way models, outputs, types).

tools.name: get_api
tools.description: Focused: just the typed API (inputs, two-way models, outputs and referenced types) of a component, by slug.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
